CVE-2009-4630.title: Mozilla Necko, as used in Firefox, SeaMonkey, and other applicati ...
CVE-2009-4630.description: Mozilla Necko, as used in Firefox, SeaMonkey, and other applications, performs DNS prefetching of domain names contained in links within local HTML documents, which makes it easier for remote attackers to determine the network location of the application's user by logging DNS requests.  NOTE: the vendor disputes the significance of this issue, stating "I don't think we necessarily need to worry about that case."

CVE-2015-8960.title: The TLS protocol 1.2 and earlier supports the rsa_fixed_dh, dss_f ...
CVE-2015-8960.description: The TLS protocol 1.2 and earlier supports the rsa_fixed_dh, dss_fixed_dh, rsa_fixed_ecdh, and ecdsa_fixed_ecdh values for ClientCertificateType but does not directly document the ability to compute the master secret in certain situations with a client secret key and server public key but not a server secret key, which makes it easier for man-in-the-middle attackers to spoof TLS servers by leveraging knowledge of the secret key for an arbitrary installed client X.509 certificate, aka the "Key Compromise Impersonation (KCI)" issue.

CVE-2023-28164.title: Dragging a URL from a cross-origin iframe that was removed during ...
CVE-2023-28164.description: Dragging a URL from a cross-origin iframe that was removed during the drag could have led to user confusion and website spoofing attacks. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 111, Firefox ESR < 102.9, and Thunderbird < 102.9.

CVE-2024-11691.title: Certain WebGL operations on Apple silicon M series devices could  ...
CVE-2024-11691.description:
Certain WebGL operations on Apple silicon M series devices could have lead to an out-of-bounds write and memory corruption due to a flaw in Apple's GPU driver.  
*This bug only affected the application on Apple M series hardware. Other platforms were unaffected.* This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133, Firefox ESR < 128.5, Firefox ESR < 115.18, Thunderbird < 133, Thunderbird < 128.5, and Thunderbird < 115.18.

CVE-2024-11698.title: A flaw in handling fullscreen transitions may have inadvertently  ...
CVE-2024-11698.description:
A flaw in handling fullscreen transitions may have inadvertently caused the application to become stuck in fullscreen mode when a modal dialog was opened during the transition. This issue left users unable to exit fullscreen mode using standard actions like pressing "Esc" or accessing right-click menus, resulting in a disrupted browsing experience until the browser is restarted.  
*This bug only affects the application when running on macOS. Other operating systems are unaffected.* This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133, Firefox ESR < 128.5, Thunderbird < 133, and Thunderbird < 128.5.

CVE-2024-11700.title: Malicious websites may have been able to perform user intent conf ...
CVE-2024-11700.description: Malicious websites may have been able to perform user intent confirmation through tapjacking. This could have led to users unknowingly approving the launch of external applications, potentially exposing them to underlying vulnerabilities. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133 and Thunderbird < 133.

CVE-2024-11701.title: The incorrect domain may have been displayed in the address bar d ...
CVE-2024-11701.description: The incorrect domain may have been displayed in the address bar during an interrupted navigation attempt. This could have led to user confusion and possible spoofing attacks. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133 and Thunderbird < 133.

CVE-2024-11702.title: Copying sensitive information from Private Browsing tabs on Andro ...
CVE-2024-11702.description: Copying sensitive information from Private Browsing tabs on Android, such as passwords, may have inadvertently stored data in the cloud-based clipboard history if enabled. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133 and Thunderbird < 133.

CVE-2024-11703.title: On Android, Firefox may have inadvertently allowed viewing saved  ...
CVE-2024-11703.description: On Android, Firefox may have inadvertently allowed viewing saved passwords without the required device PIN authentication. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133.

CVE-2024-11705.title: `NSC_DeriveKey` inadvertently assumed that the `phKey` parameter  ...
CVE-2024-11705.description: `NSC_DeriveKey` inadvertently assumed that the `phKey` parameter is always non-NULL. When it was passed as NULL, a segmentation fault (SEGV) occurred, leading to crashes. This behavior conflicted with the PKCS#11 v3.0 specification, which allows `phKey` to be NULL for certain mechanisms. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133 and Thunderbird < 133.

CVE-2024-11708.title: Missing thread synchronization primitives could have led to a dat ...
CVE-2024-11708.description: Missing thread synchronization primitives could have led to a data race on members of the PlaybackParams structure. This vulnerability affects Firefox < 133 and Thunderbird < 133.

CVE-2024-43097.title: In resizeToAtLeast of SkRegion.cpp, there is a possible out of bo ...
CVE-2024-43097.description: In resizeToAtLeast of SkRegion.cpp, there is a possible out of bounds write due to an integer overflow. This could lead to local escalation of privilege with no additional execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

CVE-2025-0244.title: When redirecting to an invalid protocol scheme, an attacker could ...
CVE-2025-0244.description:
When redirecting to an invalid protocol scheme, an attacker could spoof the address bar. 
*Note: This issue only affected Android operating systems. Other operating systems are unaffected.*. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 134.

CVE-2025-0245.title: Under certain circumstances, a user opt-in setting that Focus sho ...
CVE-2025-0245.description: Under certain circumstances, a user opt-in setting that Focus should require authentication before use could have been be bypassed. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 134.

CVE-2025-0247.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 133 and Thunderbird 133. So ...
CVE-2025-0247.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 133 and Thunderbird 133. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 134 and Thunderbird 134.

CVE-2025-10530.title: Spoofing issue in the WebAuthn component in Firefox for Android.  ...
CVE-2025-10530.description: Spoofing issue in the WebAuthn component in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 143 and Thunderbird 143.

CVE-2025-10531.title: Mitigation bypass in the Web Compatibility: Tooling component. Th ...
CVE-2025-10531.description: Mitigation bypass in the Web Compatibility: Tooling component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 143 and Thunderbird 143.

CVE-2025-10533.title: Integer overflow in the SVG component. This vulnerability was fix ...
CVE-2025-10533.description: Integer overflow in the SVG component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 143, Firefox ESR 115.28, Firefox ESR 140.3, Thunderbird 143, and Thunderbird 140.3.

CVE-2025-10534.title: Spoofing issue in the Site Permissions component. This vulnerabil ...
CVE-2025-10534.description: Spoofing issue in the Site Permissions component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 143 and Thunderbird 143.

CVE-2025-10535.title: Information disclosure, mitigation bypass in the Privacy componen ...
CVE-2025-10535.description: Information disclosure, mitigation bypass in the Privacy component in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 143.

CVE-2025-11709.title: A compromised web process was able to trigger out of bounds reads ...
CVE-2025-11709.description: A compromised web process was able to trigger out of bounds reads and writes in a more privileged process using manipulated WebGL textures. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 144, Firefox ESR 115.29, Firefox ESR 140.4, Thunderbird 144, and Thunderbird 140.4.

CVE-2025-11710.title: A compromised web process using malicious IPC messages could have ...
CVE-2025-11710.description: A compromised web process using malicious IPC messages could have caused the privileged browser process to reveal blocks of its memory to the compromised process. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 144, Firefox ESR 115.29, Firefox ESR 140.4, Thunderbird 144, and Thunderbird 140.4.

CVE-2025-11711.title: There was a way to change the value of JavaScript Object properti ...
CVE-2025-11711.description: There was a way to change the value of JavaScript Object properties that were supposed to be non-writeable. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 144, Firefox ESR 115.29, Firefox ESR 140.4, Thunderbird 144, and Thunderbird 140.4.

CVE-2025-11714.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.28, Firefox ESR 140 ...
CVE-2025-11714.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.28, Firefox ESR 140.3, Thunderbird ESR 140.3, Firefox 143 and Thunderbird 143. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 144, Firefox ESR 115.29, Firefox ESR 140.4, Thunderbird 144, and Thunderbird 140.4.

CVE-2025-12380.title: Starting with Firefox 142, it was possible for a compromised chil ...
CVE-2025-12380.description: Starting with Firefox 142, it was possible for a compromised child process to trigger a use-after-free in the GPU or browser process using WebGPU-related IPC calls. This may have been usable to escape the child process sandbox. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 144.0.2.

CVE-2025-13012.title: Race condition in the Graphics component. This vulnerability was  ...
CVE-2025-13012.description: Race condition in the Graphics component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145, Firefox ESR 140.5, Firefox ESR 115.30, Thunderbird 145, and Thunderbird 140.5.

CVE-2025-13013.title: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Core & HTML component. This vulnera ...
CVE-2025-13013.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Core & HTML component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145, Firefox ESR 140.5, Firefox ESR 115.30, Thunderbird 145, and Thunderbird 140.5.

CVE-2025-13015.title: Spoofing issue in Firefox. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefo ...
CVE-2025-13015.description: Spoofing issue in Firefox. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145, Firefox ESR 140.5, and Firefox ESR 115.30.

CVE-2025-13016.title: Incorrect boundary conditions in the JavaScript: WebAssembly comp ...
CVE-2025-13016.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145, Firefox ESR 140.5, Thunderbird 145, and Thunderbird 140.5.

CVE-2025-13021.title: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component.  ...
CVE-2025-13021.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145 and Thunderbird 145.

CVE-2025-13022.title: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component.  ...
CVE-2025-13022.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145 and Thunderbird 145.

CVE-2025-13023.title: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphi ...
CVE-2025-13023.description: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: WebGPU component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145 and Thunderbird 145.

CVE-2025-13024.title: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This  ...
CVE-2025-13024.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 145 and Thunderbird 145.

CVE-2025-14321.title: Use-after-free in the WebRTC: Signaling component. This vulnerabi ...
CVE-2025-14321.description: Use-after-free in the WebRTC: Signaling component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14322.title: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphi ...
CVE-2025-14322.description: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: CanvasWebGL component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 115.31, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14323.title: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Notifications component. This vu ...
CVE-2025-14323.description: Privilege escalation in the DOM: Notifications component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 115.31, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14324.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 115.31, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14325.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14326.title: Use-after-free in the Audio/Video: GMP component. This vulnerabil ...
CVE-2025-14326.description: Use-after-free in the Audio/Video: GMP component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146 and Thunderbird 146.

CVE-2025-14327.title: Spoofing issue in the Downloads Panel component. This vulnerabili ...
CVE-2025-14327.description: Spoofing issue in the Downloads Panel component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Thunderbird 146, Firefox ESR 140.7, and Thunderbird 140.7.

CVE-2025-14328.title: Privilege escalation in the Netmonitor component. This vulnerabil ...
CVE-2025-14328.description: Privilege escalation in the Netmonitor component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14329.title: Privilege escalation in the Netmonitor component. This vulnerabil ...
CVE-2025-14329.description: Privilege escalation in the Netmonitor component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14330.title: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This  ...
CVE-2025-14330.description: JIT miscompilation in the JavaScript Engine: JIT component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14331.title: Same-origin policy bypass in the Request Handling component. This ...
CVE-2025-14331.description: Same-origin policy bypass in the Request Handling component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 115.31, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14332.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 145 and Thunderbird 145. So ...
CVE-2025-14332.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 145 and Thunderbird 145. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146 and Thunderbird 146.

CVE-2025-14333.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 140.5, Thunderbird ESR  ...
CVE-2025-14333.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 140.5, Thunderbird ESR 140.5, Firefox 145 and Thunderbird 145. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146, Firefox ESR 140.6, Thunderbird 146, and Thunderbird 140.6.

CVE-2025-14860.title: Use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component. This vuln ...
CVE-2025-14860.description: Use-after-free in the Disability Access APIs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146.0.1.

CVE-2025-14861.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 146. Some of these bugs sho ...
CVE-2025-14861.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 146. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 146.0.1.

CVE-2025-1939.title: Android apps can load web pages using the Custom Tabs feature. Th ...
CVE-2025-1939.description: Android apps can load web pages using the Custom Tabs feature. This feature supports a transition animation that could have been used to trick a user into granting sensitive permissions by hiding what the user was actually clicking. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 136.

CVE-2025-1940.title: A select option could partially obscure the confirmation prompt s ...
CVE-2025-1940.description:
A select option could partially obscure the confirmation prompt shown before launching external apps. This could be used to trick a user in to launching an external app unexpectedly. 
*This issue only affects Android versions of Firefox.*. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 136.

CVE-2025-1941.title: Under certain circumstances, a user opt-in setting that Focus sho ...
CVE-2025-1941.description: Under certain circumstances, a user opt-in setting that Focus should require authentication before use could have been be bypassed (distinct from CVE-2025-0245). This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 136.

CVE-2025-1942.title: When String.toUpperCase() caused a string to get longer it was po ...
CVE-2025-1942.description: When String.toUpperCase() caused a string to get longer it was possible for uninitialized memory to be incorporated into the result string. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 136 and Thunderbird 136.

CVE-2025-1943.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 135 and Thunderbird 135. So ...
CVE-2025-1943.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 135 and Thunderbird 135. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 136 and Thunderbird 136.

CVE-2025-2817.title: Thunderbird's update mechanism allowed a medium-integrity user pr ...
CVE-2025-2817.description: Thunderbird's update mechanism allowed a medium-integrity user process to interfere with the SYSTEM-level updater by manipulating the file-locking behavior. By injecting code into the user-privileged process, an attacker could bypass intended access controls, allowing SYSTEM-level file operations on paths controlled by a non-privileged user and enabling privilege escalation. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138, Firefox ESR 128.10, Firefox ESR 115.23, Thunderbird 138, and Thunderbird 128.10.

CVE-2025-3028.title: JavaScript code running while transforming a document with the XS ...
CVE-2025-3028.description: JavaScript code running while transforming a document with the XSLTProcessor could lead to a use-after-free. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 137, Firefox ESR 115.22, Firefox ESR 128.9, Thunderbird 137, and Thunderbird 128.9.

CVE-2025-3029.title: A crafted URL containing specific Unicode characters could have h ...
CVE-2025-3029.description: A crafted URL containing specific Unicode characters could have hidden the true origin of the page, resulting in a potential spoofing attack. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 137, Firefox ESR 128.9, Thunderbird 137, and Thunderbird 128.9.

CVE-2025-3031.title: An attacker could read 32 bits of values spilled onto the stack i ...
CVE-2025-3031.description: An attacker could read 32 bits of values spilled onto the stack in a JIT compiled function. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 137 and Thunderbird 137.

CVE-2025-3032.title: Leaking of file descriptors from the fork server to web content p ...
CVE-2025-3032.description: Leaking of file descriptors from the fork server to web content processes could allow for privilege escalation attacks. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 137 and Thunderbird 137.

CVE-2025-3033.title: After selecting a malicious Windows `.url` shortcut from the loca ...
CVE-2025-3033.description:
After selecting a malicious Windows `.url` shortcut from the local filesystem, an unexpected file could be uploaded.  
*This bug only affects Firefox on Windows. Other operating systems are unaffected.*. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 137 and Thunderbird 137.

CVE-2025-3034.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 136 and Thunderbird 136. So ...
CVE-2025-3034.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 136 and Thunderbird 136. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 137 and Thunderbird 137.

CVE-2025-3035.title: By first using the AI chatbot in one tab and later activating it  ...
CVE-2025-3035.description: By first using the AI chatbot in one tab and later activating it in another tab, the document title of the previous tab would leak into the chat prompt. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 137.

CVE-2025-4082.title: Modification of specific WebGL shader attributes could trigger an ...
CVE-2025-4082.description:
Modification of specific WebGL shader attributes could trigger an out-of-bounds read, which, when chained with other vulnerabilities, could be used to escalate privileges.
*This bug only affects Thunderbird for macOS. Other versions of Thunderbird are unaffected.*. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138, Firefox ESR 128.10, Firefox ESR 115.23, Thunderbird 138, and Thunderbird 128.10.

CVE-2025-4083.title: A process isolation vulnerability in Thunderbird stemmed from imp ...
CVE-2025-4083.description: A process isolation vulnerability in Thunderbird stemmed from improper handling of javascript: URIs, which could allow content to execute in the top-level document's process instead of the intended frame, potentially enabling a sandbox escape. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138, Firefox ESR 128.10, Firefox ESR 115.23, Thunderbird 138, and Thunderbird 128.10.

CVE-2025-4085.title: An attacker with control over a content process could potentially ...
CVE-2025-4085.description: An attacker with control over a content process could potentially leverage the privileged UITour actor to leak sensitive information or escalate privileges. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138 and Thunderbird 138.

CVE-2025-4086.title: A specially crafted filename containing a large number of encoded ...
CVE-2025-4086.description:
A specially crafted filename containing a large number of encoded newline characters could obscure the file's extension when displayed in the download dialog.
*This bug only affects Thunderbird for Android. Other versions of Thunderbird are unaffected.*. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138 and Thunderbird 138.

CVE-2025-4087.title: A vulnerability was identified in Thunderbird where XPath parsing ...
CVE-2025-4087.description: A vulnerability was identified in Thunderbird where XPath parsing could trigger undefined behavior due to missing null checks during attribute access. This could lead to out-of-bounds read access and potentially, memory corruption. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138, Firefox ESR 128.10, Thunderbird 138, and Thunderbird 128.10.

CVE-2025-4088.title: A security vulnerability in Thunderbird allowed malicious sites t ...
CVE-2025-4088.description: A security vulnerability in Thunderbird allowed malicious sites to use redirects to send credentialed requests to arbitrary endpoints on any site that had invoked the Storage Access API. This enabled potential Cross-Site Request Forgery attacks across origins. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138 and Thunderbird 138.

CVE-2025-4089.title: Due to insufficient escaping of special characters in the "copy a ...
CVE-2025-4089.description: Due to insufficient escaping of special characters in the "copy as cURL" feature, an attacker could trick a user into using this command, potentially leading to local code execution on the user's system. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138 and Thunderbird 138.

CVE-2025-4090.title: A vulnerability existed in Thunderbird for Android where potentia ...
CVE-2025-4090.description: A vulnerability existed in Thunderbird for Android where potentially sensitive library locations were logged via Logcat. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138 and Thunderbird 138.

CVE-2025-4091.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 137, Thunderbird 137, Firef ...
CVE-2025-4091.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 137, Thunderbird 137, Firefox ESR 128.9, and Thunderbird 128.9. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138, Firefox ESR 128.10, Thunderbird 138, and Thunderbird 128.10.

CVE-2025-4092.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 137 and Thunderbird 137. So ...
CVE-2025-4092.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 137 and Thunderbird 137. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 138 and Thunderbird 138.

CVE-2025-6424.title: A use-after-free in FontFaceSet resulted in a potentially exploit ...
CVE-2025-6424.description: A use-after-free in FontFaceSet resulted in a potentially exploitable crash. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140, Firefox ESR 115.25, Firefox ESR 128.12, Thunderbird 140, and Thunderbird 128.12.

CVE-2025-6425.title: An attacker who enumerated resources from the WebCompat extension ...
CVE-2025-6425.description: An attacker who enumerated resources from the WebCompat extension could have obtained a persistent UUID that identified the browser, and persisted between containers and normal/private browsing mode, but not profiles. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140, Firefox ESR 115.25, Firefox ESR 128.12, Thunderbird 140, and Thunderbird 128.12.

CVE-2025-6427.title: An attacker was able to bypass the `connect-src` directive of a C ...
CVE-2025-6427.description: An attacker was able to bypass the `connect-src` directive of a Content Security Policy by manipulating subdocuments. This would have also hidden the connections from the Network tab in Devtools. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140 and Thunderbird 140.

CVE-2025-6429.title: Firefox could have incorrectly parsed a URL and rewritten it to t ...
CVE-2025-6429.description: Firefox could have incorrectly parsed a URL and rewritten it to the youtube.com domain when parsing the URL specified in an `embed` tag.  This could have bypassed website security checks that restricted which domains users were allowed to embed. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140, Firefox ESR 128.12, Thunderbird 140, and Thunderbird 128.12.

CVE-2025-6430.title: When a file download is specified via the `Content-Disposition` h ...
CVE-2025-6430.description: When a file download is specified via the `Content-Disposition` header, that directive would be ignored if the file was included via a `<embed>` or `<object>` tag, potentially making a website vulnerable to a cross-site scripting attack. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140, Firefox ESR 128.12, Thunderbird 140, and Thunderbird 128.12.

CVE-2025-6432.title: When Multi-Account Containers was enabled, DNS requests could hav ...
CVE-2025-6432.description: When Multi-Account Containers was enabled, DNS requests could have bypassed a SOCKS proxy when the domain name was invalid or the SOCKS proxy was not responding. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140 and Thunderbird 140.

CVE-2025-6433.title: If a user visited a webpage with an invalid TLS certificate, and  ...
CVE-2025-6433.description: If a user visited a webpage with an invalid TLS certificate, and granted an exception, the webpage was able to provide a WebAuthn challenge that the user would be prompted to complete.  This is in violation of the WebAuthN spec which requires "a secure transport established without errors". This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140 and Thunderbird 140.

CVE-2025-6434.title: The exception page for the HTTPS-Only feature, displayed when a w ...
CVE-2025-6434.description: The exception page for the HTTPS-Only feature, displayed when a website is opened via HTTP, lacked an anti-clickjacking delay, potentially allowing an attacker to trick a user into granting an exception and loading a webpage over HTTP. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140 and Thunderbird 140.

CVE-2025-6435.title: If a user saved a response from the Network tab in Devtools using ...
CVE-2025-6435.description: If a user saved a response from the Network tab in Devtools using the Save As context menu option, that file may not have been saved with the `.download` file extension. This could have led to the user inadvertently running a malicious executable. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140 and Thunderbird 140.

CVE-2025-6436.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 139 and Thunderbird 139. So ...
CVE-2025-6436.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 139 and Thunderbird 139. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 140 and Thunderbird 140.

CVE-2025-9186.description: Spoofing issue in the Address Bar component of Firefox Focus for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 142.

CVE-2025-9187.title: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 141 and Thunderbird 141. So ...
CVE-2025-9187.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox 141 and Thunderbird 141. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 142 and Thunderbird 142.

CVE-2026-0877.title: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerabil ...
CVE-2026-0877.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: Security component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 147, Firefox ESR 115.32, Firefox ESR 140.7, Thunderbird 147, and Thunderbird 140.7.

CVE-2026-0878.title: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphi ...
CVE-2026-0878.description: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics: CanvasWebGL component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 147, Firefox ESR 140.7, Thunderbird 147, and Thunderbird 140.7.

CVE-2026-0879.title: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphi ...
CVE-2026-0879.description: Sandbox escape due to incorrect boundary conditions in the Graphics component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 147, Firefox ESR 115.32, Firefox ESR 140.7, Thunderbird 147, and Thunderbird 140.7.

CVE-2026-0880.title: Sandbox escape due to integer overflow in the Graphics component. ...
CVE-2026-0880.description: Sandbox escape due to integer overflow in the Graphics component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 147, Firefox ESR 115.32, Firefox ESR 140.7, Thunderbird 147, and Thunderbird 140.7.

CVE-2026-0881.title: Sandbox escape in the Messaging System component. This vulnerabil ...
CVE-2026-0881.description: Sandbox escape in the Messaging System component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 147 and Thunderbird 147.

CVE-2026-0882.title: Use-after-free in the IPC component. This vulnerability was fixed ...
